_attribution.author: https://github.com/mluggy
_attribution.note: Michael Lugassy (mluggy) — LinkedIn post describing SQL-over-MCP curated flight dataset agent.

dataSources.name: openflights-airports
dataSources.notes: 3,888 airports baseline; IATA + ICAO codes, tz, country

dataSources.name: openflights-routes
dataSources.notes: 59,079 direct routes; carrier, src, dst, equipment

dataSources.name: kiwi-tequila-schedules
dataSources.notes: July schedules expansion: ~1M+ relevant connection combinations

dataSources.name: manual-weather-band-table
dataSources.notes: Curated weather-similarity band per IATA for 'same weather' predicate

schemaGoal: A compact relational schema over airports, routes, schedules, and weather bands that answers questions like 'cheapest 2-3 day stopover in Madrid en route to OPO/FAO' via a single SQL query.
sampleQueries: List direct routes from TLV to Portugal (OPO, FAO, LIS) in July under 2000 ILS.
Find 2-3 day stopover combinations via MAD that beat the cheapest direct TLV->OPO fare.
Compare Air Portugal vs El Al morning vs afternoon departures TLV->LIS.
Which aircraft type (Airbus NEO vs older Boeing) serves TLV->MAD most often?
Show the 14 cheapest European stopover cities for a Portugal trip matching TLV summer weather band.
Total trip cost (outbound + return) with a stopover on the return only.
Rank carriers by on-time reputation for TLV->BCN in July.
Find any stopover city where two-destination total cost < cheapest direct TLV->Portugal fare.
